description_long: This is a bright green all-terrain vehicle (ATV) with an open cab and oversized, deeply treaded black tires designed for rugged environments. The front features a robust silver grille and bumper, with a raised hood and visible headlights. The sides reveal a sturdy roll cage, a large vertical exhaust pipe on the right, and metallic step plates for easy entry. The rear is open, showing a simple bench seat and a utilitarian cargo area, with the roll cage extending to the back for added safety. The wheels are large and thick, with pronounced blocky treads for maximum traction on uneven surfaces. The vehicle's construction suggests a mix of metal and plastic components, with a utilitarian, functional design suited for off-road and urban adventure.
description: A bright green, open-cab all-terrain vehicle with oversized, block-treaded black tires, a roll cage, and a prominent side exhaust pipe. Its rugged build and exposed features make it ideal for off-road and urban exploration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide stance, silver grille, headlights, and the large, blocky tires dominating the appearance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cab, roll cage, metallic step plate, and the large vertical exhaust pipe behind the cab.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open cargo area, simple bench seat, and the roll cage extending to the back, with the exhaust pipe visible on the right.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cab, roll cage, step plate, and the large tires, with the exhaust pipe more prominently visible.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, knobby tread pattern with deep grooves, optimized for all-terrain traction and off-road performance.
